content.en:
Of course, unless he was forced to do so, he would not flee to the boundary of territorial waters.

Swish!

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor turned around and shuttled in the direction of Ye Tianlai.

Soon, the two collided.

"Seal!"

The Sycamore Heavenly Ancestor sacrificed a special round ball, which instantly sealed this area in.

At this moment, neither Wutong Tianzu nor Ye Tian could transmit news to the outside world.

Moreover, this ball can also ensure that the breath of battle cannot be transmitted, and no matter how much you fight, it is not easy to be detected.

If you don't transmit your breath, even if you are a Heavenly Ancestor, you won't be able to explore too far in the Infinite Realm Ruins, and you won't be able to sense the specialness of this area.

Even if they did, it would take them a long time to find the spot.

This avoids a situation where he will be besieged.

......

"Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, it's really you!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Didn't you guess it a long time ago, but I can't be 100% sure, it was indeed me who gave birth to the true dragon worm mother, so what? I just want to be strong!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor said coldly.

Ye Tian said coldly: "It's true that you want to become strong, but you want to destroy countless immeasurable realms and realms, this is looking for death!"

"Hahahaha, the weak eat the strong, a group of ants, even if they are killed, they can be bred again in a long time. There is no point in saying this, if you dare to kill me, I will kill you!"

With a wave of his hand, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor released the True Dragon Worm Mother.

At this moment, Ye Tian needed to face the two major battles of Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and True Dragon Insect Mother.

If it was an ordinary Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, he would have panicked a long time ago, after all, the Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor could only compete with an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor at most, and it only competed for a period of time, which did not mean that he could fight.

Coupled with another Boundary-Breaking True Dragon Worm Mother, it was enough to surround and kill a newly promoted Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

This area instantly turned into a sea of fire, this is an immeasurable supernatural technique of Wutong Heavenly Ancestor - the immeasurable sea of flames!

Using this immeasurable supernatural technique, he could allow the power of the flames to continuously invade Ye Tian's body, thus taking advantage of the battle.

Then.

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and True Dragon Insect Mother attacked Ye Tian at the same time.

"Ten Arms Golden Body!"

Ye Tian turned into a ten-armed golden body, and immediately unleashed the Heaven Killing Blade.

Swish!

The light of the Sky Slaying Blade sliced through the immeasurable sea of flames and slashed towards the attacking Sycamore Heavenly Ancestor.

"You've become a Sky Slayer!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was slightly surprised, this immeasurable supernatural power technique ranked fifth on the immeasurable supernatural power list, which was much higher than the ten-armed golden body ranked ninth, and its attack power was far greater than that of the ten-armed golden body.

The other Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestors were all cultivating several immeasurable divine power techniques outside the top ten, and the two immeasurable divine power techniques that Ye Tian casually performed were actually ranked in the top ten of the immeasurable divine power list.

Bang!

A flame knife condensed by the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor with immeasurable supernatural powers collided with the Heaven Slaying Blade.

In an instant, the Flame Knife shattered.

The Sky Slayer Blade directly pierced through a piece of armor on his body and a defensive immeasurable magic technique, directly knocking him away.

The True Dragon Worm Mother took the opportunity to attack Ye Tian, but was blocked by Ye Tian's ten arms.

"Sure enough, the Heaven Killing Blade can only hurt the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, and it is impossible to kill the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor by relying on the Heaven Killing Blade!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

And at this moment, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was shocked.

It could be seen from the blow just now that Ye Tian was not a first-time Boundary Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

It's not that he hasn't fought against the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level, but the physical bodies of the other Fifth Stage Great Ancestors of the Boundary Breaking Level are definitely not as strong as Ye Tian!

This is almost the top level of the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level!

He underestimated Ye Tian!

"Trouble, I'm afraid it's hard to kill him!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was thinking about what to do next.

But at this time, Ye Tian performed another immeasurable magic technique.

Airplanes!

A polar light suddenly appeared, hitting the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor's reaction was fast, but it was still not as fast as this light.

Burst!

His body was directly pierced, and even the surrounding void was shattered, and even the barrier formed by the orb treasure that trapped this area was pierced with a blow.

"The Pole of the Arts!!!!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor's pupils shrank.

How could he not recognize it, this is the pole technique that ranks first on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers, this is the immeasurable supernatural power technique that will kill if you fail to cultivate!

"You are really crazy, you dare to cultivate the art of the extreme, are you not afraid of falling?"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor shouted.

"It's none of your business if I'm afraid or not, I've practiced it anyway, haven't I?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was really panicked, Ye Tian had practiced the extreme technique, even if he didn't step into the Heavenly Ancestor realm, his strength was much stronger than him.

The key is that the Extreme Technique restrains the body of the Heavenly Ancestor and restrains many immeasurable magical powers, and it can't be stopped at all!

At this moment, Ye Tian once again performed the Extreme Technique.

This time, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor tried to resist, but he still couldn't block it, and was penetrated through his body again.

It was very difficult for the Heavenly Ancestor to be killed, so even if he was pierced twice in a row, he was still not seriously injured.

Airplanes!

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor put away the orb treasure and lifted the blockade.

Immediately, he tried to escape.

"True Dragon Worm Mother, you come to stop the Endless Great Ancestor!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor ordered.

Although he was very reluctant to be a true dragon worm mother, he didn't want to die even more.

Rumble!!!

The True Dragon Worm Mother kept attacking Ye Tian, delaying time for the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor to escape.

However.

The True Dragon Worm Mother had only just stepped into the Boundary Breaking Level, and her combat ability was limited, so she was only equivalent to an ordinary Boundary Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

Puff puff puff!!!

Ye Tian's extreme technique fell on the True Dragon Worm Mother, piercing its body again and again, and severely damaging it again and again.

In the blink of an eye, the True Dragon Worm Mother was about to fall and die.

The other side.

A group of Heavenly Ancestors rushed to the nest of the immeasurable ruin monster and wiped out the nest with a wave of their hands, but only found some true dragon insects, and there was no real dragon worm mother.

At this moment, they received a summons from Ye Tian.

"The Endless Great Ancestor has found the True Dragon Insect Mother and the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, and at present, the True Dragon Insect Mother has dragged the Endless Great Ancestor, and the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor is fleeing!"

After these Heavenly Ancestors received the news, some of them went to hunt down the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, and some of them went to help Ye Tian deal with the True Dragon Insect Mother.

And when these Heavenly Ancestors arrived here at Ye Tian, the True Dragon Worm Mother was already dying.
